stories.title: Cubs 6, Twins 2 — Boyd & Hoerner Carry Game 2
stories.angle: Cubs bounce back to tie series 1-1; Matthew Boyd earns 4th straight win (6 IP, 1R); Nico Hoerner ties career high with 4 hits; Busch homers; Amaya and Ramirez combine for 4 RBI

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
```
Matthew Boyd picked RIGHT back up. 6 innings, 1 run, his 4th straight win.

Cubs 6, Twins 2. Nico Hoerner tied a career high with 4 hits. Busch homered. Amaya and Ramirez each drove in two.

Series tied 1-1. Rubber game at Wrigley — 1:20 PM CT. ⚾

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW
```

stories.title: Matthew Boyd — 4-Game Win Streak, Rotation Anchor Nobody Expected
stories.angle: Boyd has won 4 straight starts in a season where 13+ pitchers have hit the IL; came back from injury layoff to give Cubs reliable innings when they needed it most

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
```
Boyd wins his 4th STRAIGHT start. 6 innings, 1 run Saturday.

In a season where the Cubs have burned through arms left and right, he's quietly become the rotation anchor.

Respect it. 💪

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #MLB
```

stories.title: Taillon Return Imminent — Tigers Series July 20 Is the Target
stories.angle: Taillon completed 2 consecutive scoreless Iowa rehab starts; return described as "imminent" by multiple outlets; Tigers series starting July 20 is the likely return window

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
```
Jameson Taillon is almost back. Two scoreless Iowa rehab starts, and the return is imminent.

The Tigers series starts July 20 — that's the likely target window.

A rotation ravaged by injuries all season. Reinforcements are finally arriving.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB
```

stories.title: Trade Deadline — 15 Days, Cubs All-In on Pitching
stories.angle: August 3 deadline now 15 days away; rotation ERA 8th-worst in MLB; Hoyer going all-in on pitching; Skubal, Peralta, Gray linked; Pedro Ramirez reportedly the chip

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
```
15 days to the August 3 deadline, and the Cubs are all-in on pitching.

Rotation ERA ranks 8th-worst in MLB. Jed Hoyer knows it. Names like Skubal, Peralta, Sonny Gray are on the radar.

The price won't be cheap. Pedro Ramirez may be the chip.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball
```

stories.title: Iowa Cubs — Owen Ayers Makes Triple-A Debut in 10-9 Loss
stories.angle: Ayers played his first Triple-A game after July 17 promotion; Iowa fell 10-9 to Memphis Redbirds; Ayers the No. 10 Cubs prospect after 22 HRs at Knoxville

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
```
Owen Ayers made his Triple-A debut in Saturday's 10-9 Iowa loss to Memphis. The No. 10 Cubs prospect joined Iowa after bashing 22 homers for Knoxville.

One step closer to Wrigley. Keep watching.

#Cubs #CubsBaseball #MLB
```

stories.title: Wild Card Watch — Cubs Hold No. 1 Spot at 55-43
stories.angle: Cubs at 55-43 lead Phillies (54-44) by half a game in NL Wild Card; Cardinals at 51-45 hold the third spot; every Wrigley win tightens playoff seeding

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
```
Cubs hold the No. 1 NL Wild Card spot at 55-43.

Phillies are right there at 54-44. Cardinals hanging on at 51-45.

No room for error in this race — every win against a club like Minnesota matters in October seeding.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB
```
